basePrice - Variable in class model.Book
 
Book - Class in model
Represents a booking entity containing details about the client, cruise, dates, and prices.
Book() - Constructor for class model.Book
Default constructor initializing empty or default values for the booking.
Book(String, int, String, String, Date, Date, double, double, int) - Constructor for class model.Book
Constructor initializing a booking with all necessary fields.
BookDAO - Interface in model
Data Access Object interface for managing Book entities.
